rationale: Both correctly diagnose the None+1 TypeError from missing extended ratio tokens and give the same confirmed workaround, but X recommends 'keep-open' while the actual thread shows Gaohan123 directing that the improvement be tracked in a separate new issue (implying this bug report itself is resolved) — Y matches this correctly. Y also shows deeper grounding (quotes the YAML header text, traces the downstream _all_ratio_ids consumer, notes both YAML headers misleadingly say 'Instruct'), while X adds an unverified specific claim (token IDs 130103-130106 in prompt_utils.py:60) not evidenced in the thread. Y also mirrors the reporter's original hardware caveat, showing closer attention to the actual conversation.
